# EMLinter

> EMLinter is a free, browser-based HTML email toolkit — a linter, beautifier, minifier,
> dark-mode tester, no-code visual editor, and bulletproof Outlook VML generators (buttons &
> backgrounds). Every tool runs client-side in the browser: pasted HTML is never uploaded,
> logged, or stored. No signup, no paywall. Built for email developers, marketers, and
> designers who write or maintain HTML email and need fast, focused, code-first utilities.

Key facts:
- 100% free, no account required. All HTML processing is local to the browser.
- Targets Gmail, Apple Mail, Outlook 2007–2024 (Word + WebView), Outlook.com, Yahoo Mail,
  Samsung Mail, Thunderbird, ProtonMail, and HEY. Outlook tools emit VML fallbacks.
- Templates are plain responsive HTML compatible with Mailchimp, Klaviyo, HubSpot, Constant
  Contact, Salesforce Marketing Cloud, Campaign Monitor, and ActiveCampaign.
- Site: https://www.emlinter.com

## Tools
- [HTML Email Linter](https://www.emlinter.com/tools/code-fix): Validate and fix common HTML email errors.
- [HTML Beautifier](https://www.emlinter.com/tools/beautify-code): Format and clean HTML email code.
- [HTML Email Minifier](https://www.emlinter.com/tools/html-minifier): Compress HTML to reduce file size.
- [Dark Mode Tester](https://www.emlinter.com/tools/dark-mode-checker): Preview how emails render in dark mode.
- [Design Copier](https://www.emlinter.com/tools/design-copier): Copy a visual design into Gmail/Outlook-ready HTML.
- [SVG to PNG](https://www.emlinter.com/tools/svg-to-png): View, edit, and convert SVG to PNG.
- [Relative Image Scaler](https://www.emlinter.com/tools/relative-image-scaler): Scale image elements proportionally.
- [HTML to Image](https://www.emlinter.com/tools/html-to-image): Convert HTML to PNG or JPG.

## Solutions
- [HTML Email Test](https://www.emlinter.com/solutions/html-email-test): Send real test emails across clients.
- [Outlook Button Generator](https://www.emlinter.com/solutions/outlook-button-generator): Bulletproof VML email buttons.
- [Outlook Background Generator](https://www.emlinter.com/solutions/outlook-background-generator): Bulletproof VML background images.
- [Outlook-Ready HTML](https://www.emlinter.com/solutions/outlook-ready-html): Fix Outlook spacing and rendering issues.
- [EML File Viewer](https://www.emlinter.com/solutions/eml-file-viewer): Open .eml files online and export them as PDF, PNG, or JPG.
- [Pixel Converter](https://www.emlinter.com/solutions/pixel-converter): px to em, rem, pt, vh, inch, cm, mm, and paper sizes.

## Editor & Templates
- [Visual Editor](https://www.emlinter.com/visual-editor): No-code drag-and-drop HTML email editor.
- [Email Templates](https://www.emlinter.com/templates): Free responsive HTML email template library.

## Resources
- [Blog](https://www.emlinter.com/resources/blog): Email development insights and tutorials.
- [Products](https://www.emlinter.com/resources/products): Premium templates and kits.
- [How It Works](https://www.emlinter.com/resources/how-it-works): Guides and walkthroughs.
- [FAQ](https://www.emlinter.com/resources/faq): Answers to common questions.
